mapper.update: update t_shipper_payment_way set deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag} where payment_way_id = #{paymentWayId}

update t_shipper_payment_way set deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag} where shipper_id in
#{item}
update t_shipper_payment_way set default_flag = #{defaultFlag} where payment_way_id = #{paymentWayId}
update t_shipper_payment_way set default_flag = #{defaultFlag} where shipper_id = #{shipperId}
mapper.select: select *,receive_image as receiveImageUrl from t_shipper_payment_way where shipper_id = #{shipperId} and deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag}
select *,receive_image as receiveImageUrl from t_shipper_payment_way where shipper_id = #{shipperId} and deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag}
